DESCRIPTION: Configuration of the temporal pipeline logic.
Days whose raw data must be processed before running the solver.
preprocessing can be done once (for last week and each days until now) and remain valid until the end of current week
wich means typicall usecase is to preprocess only today (new) raw file
(just before planning tonight rebalancing operations) and then solve tonight problem
Days for which the nightly regulation optimization must be computed.
Each solve typically takes about 5 minutes.
To solve the planning problem for a given day (e.g. Wednesday night),
following data needs to have been preprocessed:
If true, the pipeline deletes the previous last_week dataset
and rebuilds it automatically from the current week data
(mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun).
